message:
fix(http): strip Trailer header and normalize Content-Length for HEAD responses

suppress_response_body_for_head() had two issues:

1. Trailer header was not removed when stripping transfer-encoding
   and trailers from the response, leaving an orphaned Trailer header
   that references non-existent trailers.

2. Content-Length was only synthesized when transfer-encoding was
   present or the body was non-empty AND no existing Content-Length
   existed. This left stale Content-Length values (e.g., "999" when
   the actual body was 5 bytes) unchanged. Now always sets
   Content-Length to the original body length when body_len != 0.

Also improved the gated-poll panic message to include written bytes
for easier debugging of test failures.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
